overview: Single-window VS Code extension. Two related but independent capabilities: (1) AI Context Runner — auto-injects per-project AI_CONTEXT JSON into agent files (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursorrules / etc.), captures permission grants from ~/.claude and ~/.codex, syncs Codex trust + sandbox modes; (2) AI Understanding — git-tracked, machine-edited model of the codebase under AI_UNDERSTANDING/ with sha1-based staleness, validator, sweep injection into agent files, and an opt-in pre-commit hook (block-narrow mode). Schema spec: AI_UNDERSTANDING_FORMAT.md.
graph:
extension.js -> aiu.js (activate AI Understanding subsystem)
extension.js -> context.js (CRUD ~/.ai-context/*.json)
extension.js -> inject.js (AI_CTX block into CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md)
extension.js -> permissions.js (Claude/Codex perm sync)
extension.js -> claude.js (run claude CLI for the AI: Run Task command)
extension.js -> settingsView.js (sidebar webview)
aiu.js -> understanding.js (computeStatus, generateSkeleton, formatStatusBar)
aiu.js -> inject.js (AIU block injection via injectMarkedBlock)
aiu.js -> hook.js (install/uninstall pre-commit hook)
settingsView.js -> understanding.js, hook.js (status section state)
inject.js -> context.js (paths, normalizePath, getCtxDir)
claude.js -> inject.js (buildAgentContext for prompt envelope)
.git/hooks/pre-commit -> .git/hooks/aiu-precommit.js (copied from cli/aiu-precommit.js at install)
